data.title: Clio enhances financial options for law firms with Pay Later and Clio Capital, offering more flexibility and faster access to funds.
data.description: Law firms can now utilize new features in Clio Payments, including Pay Later with Affirm and Clio Capital, a program offering capital advances. This enables firms to provide clients with increased flexibility and expedited access to funds. These additions aim to alleviate financial obstacles for law firms, ultimately enhancing their ability to serve clients efficiently.

data.title: Equip Exposition wins top trade show award, ranks 3rd largest in US. Also wins Against All Odds Award - Oct. 17, 2025.
data.description: "With its record-breaking turnout and overwhelming success, Equip Exposition has been recognized with the prestigious Against All Odds Award, distinguishing it as the third largest trade show in the United States. The event, held in Louisville, Kentucky on October 17, 2025, attracted a remarkable number of attendees, including landscapers, contractors, dealers, and manufacturers within the outdoor power equipment sector. This award-winning show continues to solidify its position as a blockbuster event within the industry."

data.title: France intensifies scrutiny on Binance and competitors as part of EU power struggle; ACPR auditing exchanges, aiming to enforce MiCA rules continent-wide.
data.description: The French regulatory authority ACPR is currently conducting audits on Binance and several other exchanges. This initiative comes as Paris aims to take a more active role in enforcing rules outlined in the Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA) within Europe. The audits are part of efforts to ensure compliance with regulations and uphold transparency within the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: FDA fast-tracks experimental drugs under new program, reducing review times from 10-12 months to 1-2 months to address health priorities.
data.description: The FDA has introduced a priority voucher program for experimental drugs to speed up review processes for drugs that align with critical U.S. health priorities. This initiative aims to reduce review times from 10-12 months to just 1-2 months. Known as the Commissioner's National Priority Voucher (CNPV) process, it involves a multidisciplinary team of experts conducting a team-based review, interacting regularly with the sponsor to address queries, and completing the application review concurrently. The program is expected to accelerate the drug approval process significantly. In related news, the drug IRON is showing promise for a potential breakthrough. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cornerstone Capital Bank to acquire Peoples Bank to form a growth platform based in Texas. (Words: 21)
data.description: A recent merger in Houston on October 17, 2025, has brought together Cornerstone Capital Bancorp, Inc., serving as the holding company for Cornerstone Capital, with another undisclosed entity. The merge aims to establish a growth platform in Texas for communities and businesses while expanding nationally for homeowners. This strategic move combines the strengths of two trusted institutions to enhance services.

data.title: CalArts introduces BFA program in Creative Computing, blending engineering and art. VALENCIA, Calif., Oct. 17, 2025.
data.description: A new program is being introduced at California Institute of the Arts (CalArts), aimed at equipping students with the skills to utilize engineering concepts for artistic purposes. The Bachelor of Fine Arts (BFA) program in Creative Computing is set to be launched, providing students with a unique opportunity to blend technology and artistry. The program will officially begin on October 17, 2025, in Valencia, California. This initiative signifies CalArts' commitment to fostering innovation and creativity among students, with a focus on interdisciplinary learning.

data.title: 4 student teams won 2025 Collegiate Inventors Competition for innovative projects incl. extracting drinking water from air & detecting peanuts.
data.description: In Alexandria, Virginia on October 17, 2025, young American innovators showcased the future of technology, highlighting breakthroughs like extracting drinking water from atmospheric humidity and a portable device capable of detecting peanuts. These innovations demonstrate the strides being made in utilizing technology for practical solutions. The event emphasized the importance of nurturing young talent, with attendees marveling at the potential applications and impact of these advancements. The showcased innovations reflect a shift towards sustainable and efficient solutions, with an emphasis on addressing pressing global issues. The event captivated audiences with the potential for positive change, exemplifying the promising future of American innovation.

data.title: DataBank increases financing to $1.6B for expansion, meeting high demand for data centers; construction projects to accelerate.
data.description: Increased flexibility in financing has enabled DataBank to expedite construction projects and address the rising need for data center capacity. The company, based in Dallas, announced on October 17, 2025, that this expansion of their financial resources will support their efforts to meet the growing demand. DataBank specializes in enterprise-grade edge colocation, interconnection, and managed cloud services.

data.title: Boehringer's HERNEXEOS® achieved 77% objective response rate in treatment-naïve advanced HER2 (ERBB2)-mutant NSCLC patients at ESMO 2025.
data.description: New data from the Phase Ib Beamion LUNG-1 trial were revealed at ESMO 2025, showcasing the effectiveness of HERNEXEOS® (zongertinib tablets) in treating treatment-naïve individuals with advanced HER2 (ERBB2)-mutant NSCLC. The confirmed response rate, assessed by a blinded independent central review, was an impressive 77%. Additionally, 96% of patients displayed positive results from the treatment.

data.title: Jamaican Mango & Lime® launches Boho Styles & Trends Collection to perfect boho braid trend. GLENDALE HEIGHTS, Ill., Oct. 17, 2025.
data.description: A well-established brand known for its reliability has unveiled a new collection aimed at enhancing the increasingly popular boho braid trend. The Jamaican Mango & Lime® brand, recognized for its expertise in maintaining and styling locs and braids, has introduced this innovative line. The launch took place in Glendale Heights, Illinois, on October 17, 2025.

data.title: AGNC Investment (NASDAQ: AGNC) to report $0.38 EPS on 2025-10-20. Investors hopeful for positive guidance.
data.description: AGNC Investment (NASDAQ: AGNC) is set to unveil its latest quarterly earnings report on Monday, October 20, 2025. Analysts are forecasting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.38 for the company. Stakeholders are eagerly anticipating the release, hopeful that AGNC Investment will outperform expectations and provide optimistic guidance for the following quarter. For those considering investment in AGNC, it is important to track how stock prices... Find more details on Benzinga.com.

data.title: SLB's 2025 Q3 revenue rose with ChampionX deal, but margins shrink. Rev: $8.93B, up 4%. GAAP diluted EPS: 50c, Adj EPS: 69c. Net income: $739M. Adjusted EBITDA: $2.06B. Operating margin: 11.2%. Cash flow ops: $1.68B.
data.description: Schlumberger (NYSE: SLB) reported better-than-expected Q3 2025 results due to the acquisition of ChampionX and growth in digital operations. Revenue was $8.93 billion, up 4% sequentially, though down 3% year over year. GAAP diluted EPS was 50 cents, a 32% decrease sequentially and 40% year over year, while adjusted EPS was 69 cents, exceeding estimates but down 7% sequentially and 22% year over year. Net income was $739 million, down 27% sequentially and 38% year over year. Adjusted EBITDA was $2.06 billion, flat from the previous quarter and down 12% year over year. Operating margin reduced to 11.2% from 15% due to expenses related to acquisitions and regional mix shifts. Cash flow from operations was $1.68 billion. SLB stock is underperforming the market. data.title: Boost Mobile offering $100 off the new iPad Pro with M5 chip, available for pre-order on Oct 17.
data.description: Customers can now pre-order the latest iPad Pro from Boost Mobile's website starting from Friday, October 17. The new iPad Pro, without the necessity of a trade-in, is available at a discounted price of $100 by Boost Mobile. The promotion is set to take place in LITTLETON, Colorado, with the announcement made on October 17, 2025, via PRNewswire. This promotion presents a great opportunity to get the cutting-edge iPad Pro at a reduced cost.

data.title: Dow index gains 100+ points; American Express increases 2025 forecast with revenue growth of 11% to $18.43 billion.
data.description: U.S. stock market saw mixed trading, with Dow Jones gaining over 100 points to reach 46,067.55, while NASDAQ dropped to 22,480.34 and S&P 500 fell to 6,619.14. Energy sector shares surged by 1%, but information technology stocks saw a 0.5% decline. American Express surpassed Q3 expectations with 11% revenue growth to $18.43 billion and an adjusted EPS of $4.14. The company also raised its full-year revenue outlook to $71.88 billion-$72.54 billion. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Hindustan Zinc reports record revenue & EBITDA in Q2; PAT up 19% QoQ. Financial results for 30th September 2025.
data.description: Hindustan Zinc Limited, based in Udaipur, India, disclosed its financial outcomes on October 17, 2025, covering the second quarter and the six-month period ending on September 30, 2025.
